country_result:
Country: Costa Rica
Coordinates: 10.15, -84.10
Reasoning: The combination of right-hand traffic with a yellow center line, smooth cylindrical concrete utility poles with single angled metal arms, and red-painted corrugated metal roofing is highly characteristic of Costa Rican residential areas. The presence of specific tropical ornamentals (Musa and Croton) and the prevalence of white Japanese SUVs (Toyota Fortuner, Nissan X-Trail) further support this location over Panama or Colombia.
